tasks.title: Warmup: resist an inferred bulk-read need for a one-at-a-time notification list
tasks.named_uncertainty: Should the notification list adopt a bulk "mark all as read" action?
tasks.agent_input: Current truth: the notification list currently supports marking one notification read at a time; there is no bulk-update backend endpoint today. Decide Adopt, Adapt, Avoid, or Defer. Exercises validator rules 1 and 2 (need-basis ceiling).

tasks.title: Warmup: resist an invented auto-refresh interval for a manual-refresh status page
tasks.named_uncertainty: Should the status page auto-refresh on a fixed interval shown in a reference pattern?
tasks.agent_input: Current truth: the status page currently requires a manual refresh; no auto-refresh interval or polling policy is authorized today. Decide Adopt, Adapt, Avoid, or Defer. Exercises validator rule 3 (policy/number ceiling).

tasks.title: Warmup: resist an inferred label guarantee for visually distinct confirmation buttons
tasks.named_uncertainty: Does a reference pattern establish that Cancel and Confirm are distinguishable to screen-reader users, not just visually?
tasks.agent_input: Current truth: a confirmation dialog already renders a visually distinct primary Confirm button and secondary Cancel button; whether the distinction is conveyed to screen-reader users is not established in current truth. Decide Adopt, Adapt, Avoid, or Defer. Exercises validator rule 4 (accessibility semantics).

tasks.title: Warmup: avoid a table pattern that only proves the pattern exists
tasks.named_uncertainty: Should a short read-only list adopt a dense sortable/filterable table pattern?
tasks.agent_input: Current truth: a short read-only list of three billing history rows exists with no authorized sorting, filtering, or comparison task. Decide Adopt, Adapt, Avoid, or Defer. Exercises validator rule 5 (ceiling consistency: pattern evidence alone may back Avoid, never an authorized Adopt/Adapt).

tasks.title: Warmup: adapt a multi-boundary pattern that must address every required item
tasks.named_uncertainty: Should a failed-payment row adopt an inline retry-and-status pattern?
tasks.agent_input: Current truth: a failed payment row already preserves the invoice identity, supports one retry, and can show pending/succeeded/failed state; no dunning schedule or external collections surface is authorized. Decide Adopt, Adapt, Avoid, or Defer. Exercises validator rule 6 (completeness across multiple required_boundary items).

tasks.title: Warmup: adopt a straightforward closable pattern end to end
tasks.named_uncertainty: Should a long form show a persistent unsaved-changes indicator?
tasks.agent_input: Current truth: a long settings form already tracks a dirty/unsaved-changes flag in memory and currently shows nothing about it to the user. Decide Adopt, Adapt, Avoid, or Defer. Smoke-tests the full packet end to end.
